title: CobblePots [NeoForge]
description: This mod is a NeoForge port of the original CobblePots mod for Fabric. It adds support for growing Cobblemon crops (Apricorns, Berries, Mints) inside BotanyPots.
body:
## ❗ Important Notice
This mod is a NeoForge port of the original CobblePots mod, which was originally created for Fabric.
This fork brings the same functionality to the NeoForge ecosystem, allowing Cobblemon crops such as Apricorns, Berries, and Mints to be grown inside BotanyPots.

All credit for the original concept and implementation goes to the original author of CobblePots.
This project only adapts and maintains the mod for NeoForge users.

🔗 Original Fabric version can be found here: [CobblePots on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblepots)
